roles.name: Master of the Restricted Section
roles.description: Keeper of the deepest magical lore — designs the over-arching Salesforce solution and guards its arcane integrity.

roles.name: Head of House
roles.description: Marshals the cohort of delivery, holds the timetable, and answers to the Headmaster.

roles.name: Keeper of the Sorting Hat
roles.description: Steward of records, layouts, fields, and permission sets — sorts every user into the right house.

roles.name: Wandmaker of Diagon Alley
roles.description: Forges Apex, LWC, and platform spells in the workshop behind the curtain.

roles.name: Wandmaker Master — Ollivander's
roles.description: Most senior wandmaker in the West — sets the bar for craft and mentors the apprentices.

roles.name: Auror Captain — Ministry HQ
roles.description: Captain over all Western Salesforce craft — sets standards and guides the senior consultants.

roles.name: Senior Auror of the Eastern Office
roles.description: Patrols the borders of customer requirements with practiced wand-work.

roles.name: Auror Trainee
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration across the realm under the Senior Auror's eye.

roles.name: Apprentice of the Wand
roles.description: Just out of Hogwarts — learns charms, spells, and config under close mentorship.

roles.name: Floo Network Architect
roles.description: Architect of the great hearth-to-hearth conduits between Salesforce and the realms beyond.

roles.name: Apparition Engineer
roles.description: Lays the runes of API, middleware, and event flows under the Floo Architect's plan.

roles.name: Owl Post Courier
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts, and the dependable owl-bound parcels.

roles.name: Potions Master
roles.description: Brews the testing regimens — finds the imperfections in the cauldron before the elixir leaves the dungeon.

roles.name: Quidditch Commentator-in-Chief
roles.description: Lifts the megaphone for the product and message — leads all marketing craft across the pitch.

roles.name: Daily Prophet Lead Reporter
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — sounds the call from front-page headlines to gather and convert.

roles.name: Witch Weekly Columnist
roles.description: Carries the campaign forward into the field — content, creative, and the weekly column.

roles.name: Order of the Phoenix Scribe
roles.description: Records what is needed and what is promised — translates between mortal Customer and the wizarding craft of design.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Gryffindor — Defence Against the Dark Arts CRM

realms.subAccountName: House of Slytherin & the Death Eaters

realms.projectName: Hogwarts Staff — Order of the Phoenix Operations Hub

workstreams.name: Testing at the Department of Mysteries

realms.projectName: Ministry of Magic — Magical Records Modernization

workstreams.name: Testing at the Department of Mysteries

gryffindor.themedRole: Senior Auror of the Eastern Office

hogwarts-staff-order-of-the-phoenix.themedRole: Senior Auror of the Eastern Office

ministry-of-magic.themedRole: Senior Auror of the Eastern Office

gryffindor.name: Sorting Ceremony
gryffindor.description: Discovery sign-off — first-years sorted, scope confirmed at the Welcome Feast.

gryffindor.name: Forge the Sword of Gryffindor
gryffindor.description: Build kickoff: the goblin-wrought blade returns to the House.

gryffindor.name: Triwizard Champion Selection
gryffindor.description: Mid-project gate: the Goblet of Fire reviews the build.

gryffindor.name: Battle of the Astronomy Tower
gryffindor.description: Phase invoice trigger: defensive lines tested under fire.

gryffindor.name: Battle of Hogwarts Victory
gryffindor.description: Go-Live: Voldemort defeated, the castle restored.

gryffindor.name: End-of-Year Feast
gryffindor.description: Hyper-care close: house cup awarded, hand-off to the next year.

slytherin-death-eaters.name: The Dark Lord Returns
slytherin-death-eaters.description: Discovery: the Dark Mark burns again at the Quidditch World Cup.

slytherin-death-eaters.name: Forge the Horcruxes
slytherin-death-eaters.description: Build: the seven anchors of the soul deployed across the kingdom.

slytherin-death-eaters.name: Audit at Malfoy Manor
slytherin-death-eaters.description: Solution review with the Dark Lord himself in the drawing room.

slytherin-death-eaters.name: Storming the Ministry
slytherin-death-eaters.description: Go-Live: the Ministry falls, the regime takes hold.

slytherin-death-eaters.name: The Dark Mark Fades
slytherin-death-eaters.description: Project close: the Dark Lord vanquished, the network goes dark.

slytherin-death-eaters.name: Final Reckoning at Gringotts
slytherin-death-eaters.description: Final invoice: Gringotts vault closed by the goblins.

hogwarts-staff-order-of-the-phoenix.name: Reconvene at Grimmauld Place
hogwarts-staff-order-of-the-phoenix.description: Project kickoff: the Order reassembles at Headquarters.

hogwarts-staff-order-of-the-phoenix.name: Fidelius Charm Cast
hogwarts-staff-order-of-the-phoenix.description: Build phase: the Secret-Keeper seals headquarters from prying eyes.

hogwarts-staff-order-of-the-phoenix.name: Battle of the Department of Mysteries
hogwarts-staff-order-of-the-phoenix.description: UAT gate: the prophecy retrieved, the Order survives the night.

hogwarts-staff-order-of-the-phoenix.name: Dumbledore's Last Stand
hogwarts-staff-order-of-the-phoenix.description: Go-Live: the Headmaster's sacrifice activates the long plan.

hogwarts-staff-order-of-the-phoenix.name: Hogwarts Reopens
hogwarts-staff-order-of-the-phoenix.description: Hyper-care close: the castle reopens to a new generation.

hogwarts-staff-order-of-the-phoenix.name: Funeral at the White Tomb
hogwarts-staff-order-of-the-phoenix.description: Final invoice: Dumbledore laid to rest by the lake.

ministry-of-magic.name: Wizengamot Hearing Convened
ministry-of-magic.description: Kickoff: the high court approves the modernization charter.

ministry-of-magic.name: Department of Mysteries Audit
ministry-of-magic.description: Discovery: the Unspeakables scope the legacy artefacts.

ministry-of-magic.name: Trace Charm Pipeline Live
ministry-of-magic.description: Build: the Trace fires across underage wand activity nationwide.

ministry-of-magic.name: Educational Decree Twenty-Four
ministry-of-magic.description: UAT acceptance: Umbridge's decrees pass review.

ministry-of-magic.name: New Minister Inaugurated
ministry-of-magic.description: Go-Live + handoff: the Minister takes the oath in the Atrium.

ministry-of-magic.name: Final Recompense from the Treasury
ministry-of-magic.description: Final invoice paid by the Ministry treasury at Gringotts.

Harry Potter.notes: Recovery at St Mungo's — basilisk venom convalescence.

Hermione Granger.notes: Library leave — research at the Hogwarts Restricted Section.

Ron Weasley.notes: Burrow furlough — de-gnoming the garden for Mum.

Sirius Black.notes: Lying low at Grimmauld Place — Order's orders.

Dolores Umbridge.notes: Kitten plate dusting — pink office refresh.
